zh.lifeSummary: 當Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos於1160年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安時，他的父親Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos29歲，母親María Gutierrez Guzmán16歲。他和Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他於1217年被列為mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla。他去世於1236年在西班牙享年76歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos于1160年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安时，他的父亲Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos29岁，母亲María Gutierrez Guzmán16岁。他和Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。他于1217年被列为mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla。他去世于1236年在西班牙享年76岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Ruiz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Pedro, Ramon, Jorge.
Spanish and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Ruy, a short form of Rodrigo .

variants.name: Ruisi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Santo, Angelo, Matteo, Carmela, Lorenzo, Pasquale, Vittorio.
Italian (Sicily): probably an Italianized form of Spanish   Ruiz  .

variants.name: Ruz
meanings: Spanish: variant of   Ruiz  .

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Elena, Rafael, Alfonso, Alicia, Angel, Araceli, Benardo, Carlos, Carlota, Cristina, Emilio.  Indian Devi, Dileep, Dilip, Gamini, Mahendra, Manoj, Sunil, Tilak.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Rodrigo, from ancient Germanic Hrōdrīc, a compound of hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + rīc ‘power, kingdom’. Rodrigo is one of the most important Spanish personal names of ancient Germanic origin. It was borne by the last of the Visigoth kings and by a Christian saint, Saint Roderick, one of the 9th-century martyrs of Córdoba. This surname is also found in and around some of the former Portuguese territories of western India.

variants.name: Ruis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Arturo, Carlos, Conception, Elba, Fernando, Jose, Josue, Juan, Jubenal, Lazaro, Lupe.
Spanish and Portuguese: variant of   Ruiz  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ceballos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Francisco, Mario, Sergio, Javier, Jesus, Miguel, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Ceballos in Cantabria. Compare   Cevallos  ,   Zeballos  , and   Zevallos  .

variants.name: Ceballo
meanings: Spanish (mainly southern): probably an altered form (singular) of   Ceballos  .

variants.name: Cevallos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Jose, Luis, Eduardo, Francisco, Jaime, Ana, Angel.
Spanish: variant of   Ceballos  .

nameMeanings.name: Gonzalo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: from a personal name formed with gund ‘battle, strife’.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos was born in 1160, in Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos, was 29 and his mother, María Gutierrez Guzmán, was 16. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. In 1217, his occupation is listed as mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla. He died in 1236, in Spain, at the age of 76, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos est né en 1160, à Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos, avait 29 ans et sa mère, María Gutierrez Guzmán, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. En 1217, sa profession de son indiquée est mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla. Il est décédé en 1236, à Espagne, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos 1160 in Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos 29 und seine Mutter María Gutierrez Guzmán 16. Er hatte mit Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1217 ist sein Beruf als mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla aufgeführt. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Spanien und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos è nato il nel 1160 nel Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, María Gutierrez Guzmán, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Nel 1217, la sua occupazione è indicata come mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla. Morì nel 1236, nel Spagna, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballosが1160年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンで生まれた時，父Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballosは29歳，母María Gutierrez Guzmánは16歳であった。彼はMarquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobosとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。1217年，職業はmayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castillaと記録されている。彼は1236年にスペインで76歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos(이)가 1160년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 María Gutierrez Guzmán(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1217년, 그의 직업은 mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla이었다. 그는 1236년 스페인에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos nasceu em 1160, em Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, María Gutierrez Guzmán, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. Em 1217, sua profissão aparece como mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla. Ele faleceu em 1236, em Espanha, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos родился в 1160 г. в местности кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали María Gutierrez Guzmán, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. В 1217 году он работал по профессии mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla. Он умер в 1236 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos nació en 1160, en Castilla y León, España, su papá, Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos, tenía 29 años y su mamá, María Gutierrez Guzmán, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Marquesa Dama Pérez de Villalobos. En 1217, su ocupación registrada era mayordomo mayor del rey enrique i de castilla. Murió en 1236, en España, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en España.
